pi_items.verified_value: True - farmOS Field Kit is a real, open-source application available on GitHub
pi_items.source: WebSearch found official GitHub repository at github.com/farmOS/field-kit, official documentation at v1.farmos.org and farmos.org, and web app at farmos.app

privileged_info_summary: The farmOS Field Kit app (org.farmos.app v0.8.0) is real and open-source. However, all three credentials are synthetic test data created specifically for this task: the URL 'farm.extension.edu' does not exist (official demo servers use 'farmos-demo.rootedsolutions.io'), the username 'field_educator' is not a standard farmOS credential, and the password 'Dem0Day2024!' does not appear in any public password databases or documentation. The app cannot actually connect to the specified URL as it is not a real server. The pass_threshold of 60 is valid and achievable, requiring the agent to fill all three fields correctly.
